currentBounties.name: Tithe Farm Delivery
currentBounties.help: Plan your watering route; bring enough stamina if you sprint.

currentBounties.name: Chicken Coop Cleanup
currentBounties.description: Kill 60 chickens around farms and coops.
currentBounties.help: Fast task; bring a few inventory spaces for feathers if you want extra GP.

currentBounties.name: Aerial Fishing Session
currentBounties.help: Bring plenty of bait; keep an eye on bank space for fish and pearls.

completedBounties.name: Callisto's Challenge
completedBounties.description: Defeat Callisto or Artio 2 times.
completedBounties.help: Wildy risk; consider a small team and fast tele options.

completedBounties.name: Blast Furnace Shift
completedBounties.description: Smelt 300 bars at the Blast Furnace (any type).
completedBounties.help: Stamina helps; use ice gloves for some bar types.

completedBounties.name: Pond-to-Plate
completedBounties.description: Catch 80 fish of any type and cook at least 50 of them.
completedBounties.help: Pick a spot near a fire/range to reduce travel.

completedBounties.name: Barbarian Assault Shift
completedBounties.description: Complete 1 full Barbarian Assault run (all waves).
completedBounties.help: Know your role calls; bring a friend group if possible for speed.

completedBounties.name: Mage Training Arena Circuit
completedBounties.description: Earn 800 points total across Mage Training Arena rooms (any mix).
completedBounties.help: Bring runes and patience; use room guides for correct patterns.

completedBounties.name: Runecrafter's Errand
completedBounties.description: Craft 500 runes (any type).
completedBounties.help: Bring essence pouches if you have them; use tiara/talisman shortcuts.

completedBounties.name: Barrows Rotation
completedBounties.description: Complete 3 full Barrows chests.
completedBounties.help: Bring prayer, a spade, and a swap for Ahrim/ Karil; use a teleport for fast banking.

completedBounties.name: Scorpia Sting Operation
completedBounties.description: Defeat Scorpia 2 times in the Wilderness.
completedBounties.help: Bring anti-venom/anti-poison and freezes if you use them; keep risk low.

completedBounties.name: Sarachnis Webbreaker
completedBounties.description: Defeat Sarachnis 3 times.
completedBounties.help: Bring crush damage and supplies for adds; practice prayer switching.

completedBounties.name: Gargoyle Contract
completedBounties.description: Kill 35 gargoyles and finish each properly.
completedBounties.help: Requires Slayer level; bring a rock hammer and enough prayer/food.

completedBounties.name: Bloodveld Feast
completedBounties.description: Defeat 40 bloodvelds in their lair.
completedBounties.help: Bring prayer or strong melee sustain; watch for aggressive stacks.

completedBounties.name: Rat Infestation
completedBounties.description: Exterminate 80 rats in sewers and basements.
completedBounties.help: Use quick-hitting weapons; low food needed.

completedBounties.name: Blast Furnace Shift
completedBounties.description: Smelt 300 bars at the Blast Furnace (any type).
completedBounties.help: Stamina helps; use ice gloves for some bar types.

completedBounties.name: Hallowed Sepulchre Trial
completedBounties.description: Complete 2 Hallowed Sepulchre runs (any floor you can access).
completedBounties.help: Bank your valuables; prioritize safe completions over risky loot early.

completedBounties.name: Barrows Rotation
completedBounties.description: Complete 3 full Barrows chests.
completedBounties.help: Bring prayer, a spade, and a swap for Ahrim/ Karil; use a teleport for fast banking.

completedBounties.name: Runecrafter's Errand
completedBounties.description: Craft 500 runes (any type).
completedBounties.help: Bring essence pouches if you have them; use tiara/talisman shortcuts.

completedBounties.name: Callisto's Challenge
completedBounties.description: Defeat Callisto or Artio 2 times.
completedBounties.help: Wildy risk; consider a small team and fast tele options.

completedBounties.name: The Gauntlet
completedBounties.description: Complete the Gauntlet — a brutal, multi-phase trial.
completedBounties.help: Top-tier gear required; consider group coordination.

completedBounties.name: Vorkath Cleanup Detail
completedBounties.description: Defeat Vorkath 4 times.
completedBounties.help: Requires DS2 completion; bring anti-dragon protection, anti-venom, and a crumble undead option.

completedBounties.name: Pest Control Tour
completedBounties.description: Win 6 Pest Control games.
completedBounties.help: Focus portals; carry a ranged weapon for spinners.

completedBounties.name: TzHaar Warm-Up
completedBounties.description: Defeat 60 TzHaar (any type) in Mor Ul Rek.
completedBounties.help: Bring prayer and a way to handle melee+ranged mixes; do not AFK.
